title: Traffic Signal Grid: Congestion Causal-Graph Recovery
isolation: candidate runs as an isolated stdin->stdout subprocess via isorun; the ground-truth flow DAG, SCM parameters and column permutation stay in the evaluator process
strategies: empty flow graph (no edges) -> reproduces the evaluator's baseline SHD = E -> ~0.1 on every grid
marginal-correlation skeleton thresholded + orient low-variance -> high-variance (equal-variance cue): recovers real structure but adds transitively-induced spurious edges

equal-variance topological ordering (iterative smallest residual variance) + regression on predecessors with a standardized-coefficient threshold: conditions away indirect associations for a low SHD that generalizes across grid sizes / snapshot counts / flow densities
constraint-based (PC-style conditional-independence) or score-based (greedy DAG search, LiNGAM via non-Gaussianity) discovery
